name: aipany
description: Aipany 级联实时语音与 Audio Intelligence 社交语音引擎

scripts.build: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run build
scripts.dev: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run dev
scripts.test: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run test && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run test
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace @aipany/protocol run build && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run typecheck && npm --workspace @aipany/audio-intelligence run build && npm --workspace @aipany/realtime-gateway run typecheck
